findings: Face proportions and pose are coherent
Eyes are clean with no colored artifacts or over-dark control stains
Skin texture is natural at local preview resolution
Hair silhouette is plausible with mild softness at edges
Lighting/background are coherent and not visibly broken
No hands, feet, or teeth visible; those categories remain unassessed, not passed
Shoulder/clothing coverage differs from expected clothed editorial portrait and should be tightened in later prompt work if wardrobe consistency matters
Control adherence is sufficient for local default preview but still requires EC2 generation and QA before target certification

promotion_decision.reason: The exact regenerated package defaults produced a clean local artifact without the earlier colored-eye/control-stain failures.

remaining_risks: Local ComfyUI proof does not replace EC2 target-runtime generation, pullback, technical QA, and whole-image visual QA
Portrait crop does not exercise hands, feet, or teeth
Wardrobe/clothing consistency needs a future prompt/profile variant if required by the final use case
